title: Just for Christmas Infinity Snowman Christmas Lights - (105 Bright Color LEDs & 12V Adaptor) Christmas Decorations with 3M Lead Wire & a Base Perfect for Families, Parties, or Festive Events
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 𝗔𝘁𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗜𝗻𝗳𝗶𝗻𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗦𝗻𝗼𝘄𝗺𝗮𝗻 𝗟𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁 – Add a magical touch to your Christmas décor with this dazzling Infinity Snowman Light, featuring 105 multi-colour LEDs and a stunning visual depth effect. Its 3D infinity design gives the illusion of endless lights, making it a true centre piece for any festive display.

𝟭𝟬𝟱 𝗠𝘂𝗹𝘁𝗶-𝗖𝗼𝗹𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗟𝗘𝗗𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗩𝗶𝘃𝗶𝗱 𝗚𝗹𝗼𝘄 – Packed with 105 vibrant LEDs, this snowman room decor light produces a warm and joyful multicolour display. The dynamic visual effect makes it a captivating decoration during the day and a glowing spectacle at night, bringing festive joy indoors or outdoors.

𝗠𝗮𝗶𝗻𝘀 𝗣𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗿𝗲𝗱 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝟯𝗠 𝗟𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗼𝗿𝗱 – Equipped with 12V a UK standard adapter and a generous 300cm power cord, this led light offers convenient placement flexibility without the need for extension leads. Perfect for walls, windows, doorways, or freestanding holiday displays.

𝗜𝗱𝗲𝗮𝗹 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗜𝗻𝗱𝗼𝗼𝗿 & 𝗢𝘂𝘁𝗱𝗼𝗼𝗿 𝗙𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗗𝗶𝘀𝗽𝗹𝗮𝘆𝘀 – Built for versatility, these Infinity Snowman christmas tree lights are suitable for both indoor and outdoor use (in covered areas). Whether it’s part of your front porch, garden display, or living room setup, it adds a colourful sparkle to your seasonal decor.

𝗘𝘆𝗲-𝗖𝗮𝘁𝗰𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗘𝗮𝘀𝘆 𝘁𝗼 𝗨𝘀𝗲 – Simple plug-in design makes setup quick and easy. The infinity-style mirror effect, combined with multicolour LED brilliance, draws attention from guests and neighbours alike. A fantastic choice for families, parties, or festive events.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 3M Cord 2 Easy to Setup 3 Mirror Display
